name: Flex
description: A flexbox layout container with shorthand direction and alignment props.

props.name: direction
props.description: Flex direction. Maps to the `flexDir` style prop.

props.name: align
props.description: Cross-axis alignment. Maps to the `alignItems` style prop.

props.name: justify
props.description: Main-axis alignment. Maps to the `justifyContent` style prop.

props.name: wrap
props.description: Flex wrapping behavior. Maps to the `flexWrap` style prop.
